ha9c5f65ag533bg4b36g800dgcf6eb3c1e27b: And they didn't cut you from navel to neck?
h874b17a1g09d6g4eaega157g33bcf927332f: I am still getting used to people like you. I know of your kind, but I do not often encounter them.
hae58e1aeg81afg4802g991bg4ae3b4a4f293: I've heard enough about your kind to know they're trouble.
h73bb02d4g850bg46begbc6bgd44d15de5ac4: Yes. Given the chance, most would cut you from navel to neck.
he2aec9ddgaaebg496fga22cg8e20a8a26a07: Great is your fortune that I've let you live.
h2fb4be6ag47f2g4612gb2d2g7e7333dbbb13: Thinking of that worm inside me... it's driving me mad.
ha7a0c92fg9c63g4c73gbba0g7ab112594d9d: We were flayed, beaten, burned, and poisoned in our training.
h33ca82e4g9d66g4ae4g89dfg993244123eba: It is our duty to withstand suffering, and our pleasure to conquer it.
ha4975165g985fg466bg9d68g0fc0e55ec69a: Come. We must locate a crèche. Observe everything. Assume nothing.
h31c07051gdf4eg4f97g89f1g29fcf8bd99b2: How do you know so much about mind flayers?
h7eabe4d6gbc88g4129g8dabgd991ee73fe02: I understand much beyond your comprehension.
h2ed12e1ag7a8fg46ebgad4dg532e976f7f4f: More to the point, I know the cure for our condition.
h4df96ac0g2541g4b48g989bgcbe71b370528: It is imperative we locate a crèche. You'd do well to observe more and question less.
he3bba675ge293g4436g9852g8a6ed60a5579: Do you know what happens if we don't find a cure?
h86983003g4c99g4bb6gb396g670429ca7659: Yes. In great detail. It starts with a fever and memory loss.
h9b0aa01cgbc04g4dbcgaeebgfd24ef8cb076: Then you start to hallucinate. Your hair falls out and you bleed from every orifice.
h232bb6b8g53ecg407ag8439gb87cc2d70776: Your bones will change form. Your jaw will split to allow room for four great tentacles.
h130e1dd4geee4g476bgbf8bgb867278f6a8b: All skin will turn to gore, and be shed to reveal new flesh underneath.
h098cd112g6037g44e6g8096g695b43fbb45c: Then you have ceased to exist, and a mind flayer is born.
hf0862721gd360g428fgb708g563899298bbd: That sounds awful. How are you so calm?
hb1d7aaceg5fa0g4589gad8dg0e8ac69a3d6f: Because I do not intend to let this happen. Not to me, and if you stick with me, not to you.
he37fa842gca0bg40f7ga236g3355ddfe36cc: We must find our kind and be rid of the parasite. It's as simple as that.
h7ca68be7gfb8eg44bega442g8e1a7beee35e: We must find my kind and be rid of the parasite. It's as simple as that.
h17c6a2acg21beg444bg916dg8b5264668c4c: The first symptoms should have long since started, though. That is what puzzles me.
h60aca250gcbe7g432dgaa7cg555fab5ce023: That shiver betrays your fear. Suppress it. It is useless.
hf0a9e91egbd52g4d55gb1feg0ef06f108171: A loathsome fate, and one I intend to avoid.
h9fef9c91gacffg4592g949fge7ee991cec80: That's not going to happen. We will find a cure.
h3d26b245gf233g4d23gbf7ega1d0eeb2111c: Words forged in steel. May your actions express the same mettle.
h4f45567ag4232g41d4gb9a6gddb2eda9252a: What might happen should we not be purified?
h71e638d2gf67fg4b93g863eg385a9c29ce6d: It starts with a fever and memory loss.
h7581894cgf9dfg4fdeg8c01gc69135085025: From which crèche do you hail?
h902dca19g35e8g4682ga45cg67303728684f: I was trained on crèche K'liir among the Tears of Selûne.
h3382b492g8ce3g40f6gad4fgeef2d6da1485: You're worried we haven't changed? This is good news.
h5ba26285g7b91g49c0gacf9g86818acbfa6f: Yes. If you give it no further thought. But anomalies lead to surprises.
h621710f5g9c9cg45b5g9626gded7d0edfd39: Besides, what hasn't happened may yet come to pass.
h5304fd5egdb8dg47ddgb44fg893870d1863d: Chk. You believe you can survive without me?
h2836b3eeg8678g491dga5e4geb19fbfb54cb: On second thought, you should stay with me.
h2e842b96ge261g46a8ga9aag830fac228ab7: Yes - go to camp. I can find you there.
he7b93222g8772g44bcg9583g04ae8764cf3d: As you say. Do not keep me waiting.
h2d3b1138g1211g4900gb4dcga116ac645887: I'd like you to join me.
h3b2db43eg54d2g448bgaf0agbf999b3e0929: You've no room. Dismiss your weakest warrior.
h8e90ac34g5ed8g4542g9021g814109e496bb: Cool off and show me some respect or we're done here.
h94394f23g7f43g4bd1gbefag129b17468db2: I required your silence, and you made me a mockery!
h38f1fa7agabaeg4f3eg8626g63c37638445e: A kith'rak demanded my head. I should have given him yours.
h6943b9edga9fbg4bc0gbd7eg487bb906b95d: Bah - this is a distraction. The kith'rak deserves the whole of my scorn.
h87b92831gd540g4ad8gbc56g9153cd6b04f0: The kith'rak demands the fugitives' heads. I should have given him yours.
hacbf5b80g6e8cg48c9ga9dfgea7b7535b487: What the hells happened back there?
hfe37adddg956bg4ec4g843eg7a1dfd3ae0b6: A kith'rak demanded my head. He'd deny me a cure.
h4de01342gfdadg4496gb1efged5a46a2c213: How dare he speak our Queen's name! How dare he dishonour her children!
hf79af523g07e4g4563gaa0cg1fa879f74c67: How dare he speak my Queen's name! How dare he dishonour her child!
h871418e3g396ag420bgb8fbg0c65f543ff30: Wasn't he acting on your Queen's command?
h75c31d3cg6602g482ag9840g199cdbb2a81b: Do not be naive. I. Followed. Protocol. I've earned Vlaakith's favour.
h4b671888ga3f6g420bg84e4g57a709c7d45d: I will remove the parasite. I will see the kith'rak dead, and present his corpse to Vlaakith herself.
h57497813g6f30g4fedga7f1gdf6e19ed0602: Show me pity again, and I will present your corpse instead.
hd83433a9g6e3dg4108gbf3bg265a1973c816: Given how badly that went, what do you plan to do next?
ha0b60e66gdca2g4bc3gb176gbe6cd39a7b7c: I will remove the parasite. I will see the kith'rak dead, and present his head to Vlaakith herself.
h78c54e64gb01bg4246ga337gdca3b08032c3: And I will leave behind this wretched realm to stand at my Queen's right hand.
h983c5bedg45c9g4fa3gbe40g23f98d12df5e: Calm yourself - save your anger for our Queen's enemies.
h734df3e8g2195g46c7gb070g6e49f999d02a: Calm yourself - save your anger for your queen's enemies.
haada3208gc957g420ag8211gbdf3c34fe85b: Yes. Judicious counsel - and vexing, given the source.
ha9a3a54dg398bg4be4gb7e7g269ad39ad1cd: I am a child of Gith. l will abide by protocol and seek the crèche caretaker, as Vlaakith has taught.
hfc40ce06g8e1cg4206g804cg9448ce3ab0f7: And then - then I will skewer the heretic with his own silver sword.
hda1c1932g6b66g4aa5gb762g90a9c4474766: Tas'ki! My rage is endless, I assure you.
h14bce442g65abg4bc3gadb0g177172817d4f: I will remove the parasite. I will see the kith'rak dead.
h58e81c53g0675g4269g8071g82b1da695cd8: And I will offer his head to Vlaakith herself.
h3d60e0b5gd556g470agad1bgb75161edd1ef: Then we will see the Queen's justice done.
hbbe64a31ge4c0g4e82gb890g6e6e9003e80f: Calm yourself - save your anger for our Queen's enemies.
hfc0a5327g94b3g4f1dgb3c0g143ab67da707: Calm yourself - save your anger for your queen's enemies.
h982477d0ge0e2g4992gbe59g22d342588724: The kith'rak is consumed by his hunt. He'd have taken my head, given the chance.
h0c3ed35bg87cbg4215g94cegfa891e8c8a12: A kith'rak demanded my death. He'd deny us a cure.
h53ce0dd0g3ef4g4461g87bcg36134c75315e: A kith'rak demanded my head. He'd deny me a cure.
h04c7c6aegc628g480bgb7bfgc95b3e9a059a: And yet you say nothing. You should rage at this heresy, and scream for his head!
h97267603gde0ag4105ga797g64264b4f50f4: How dare he speak my Queen's name! How dare he dishonour her child!
h8bec2ba9gea16g4d2dg8cc9g44cee6d11e4c: The kith'rak is consumed by his hunt. He'd have taken our lives, given the chance.
h444b3b6eg6a48g4b41g9c9eg065d929f9a33: The kith'rak is consumed by his hunt. He'd have taken my life, given the chance.
h79f35d39g672eg43c1ga05cgfa97406b15d2: You are right to be angry. The kith'rak is a danger.
hb9f9af3dgd165g4208g9095g12622d274df4: He demanded our heads. He'd deny us a cure.
h26a11d00g17b4g4359gb33fg1afb8e2c9c27: This accursed weapon has distorted his loyalty. He'd sever our heads, given the chance.
